description: Yi He discusses the inception of Binance Blockchain Week (BBW) in 2018 during a bear market, emphasizing the need to build confidence in the crypto industry. He highlights the event's growth into a significant date in the crypto calendar and its role in fostering community and awareness around blockchain technology. The event is hosted in Dubai at the Coca Cola Arena, chosen for the UAE's supportive stance towards the crypto industry. Yi also reflects on Binance's global community and the importance of building value beyond mere profit.
topic_summary: Yi He, co-founder of Binance, shares insights on the origins and significance of Binance Blockchain Week, the supportive environment in the UAE for crypto, and the importance of community in the blockchain space. He predicts increased traditional financial integration into the crypto industry by 2025.
